Education
Bachelor of Science - Cognitive Systems (Computational Intelligence and Design Stream)
University of British Columbia



Graduated: 2016

Cognitive Systems is an multidisciplinary program, a combination of the fields of Computer Science, Philosophy, Psychology, Neuroscience, and Linguistics. There are different streams which emphasize certain fields more heavily. I was in the Computational Intelligence and Design stream which emphazises Computer Science more so than the other adjacent and overlapping domains.



High School - Indian School Certificate
The Doon School

Graduated: 2009

Subjects for Indian School Certificate - Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Computer Science, English
